intro: First Thursday recovery Z1 under the §2.A revision (2026-05-27) — Hyp A is now Wed (logged 5/27), Wed is rest, and Thu is the relocated midweek easy run (no longer flex-rest unless yellow/red per §11.C).

Pace honesty is the watch-item: short Z1 runs have crept past the §4.A floor (W5 Mon 9:21, W5 Fri 9:35) while the W5 Sat long held 10:04. Aim mid-band today (Adj #9 — also: HR off-191 zones skew low; nasal-gate is the physiological reference).

flags: Pace honesty — keep inside §4.A Z1 9:45–10:45/mi, target ~10:00–10:30/mi; if you drift under 9:45, ease back (Adj #9 — pace-creep pattern, no MHR retest yet).
Nasal-gate breathing is the Z1 reference until MHR retest (Adj #9). HR will run above the off-191 ≤155 cap — that's the rower-test artifact, not a real ceiling. If nasal breaks, slow down.
Yellow/red AM → revert to rest (§11.C / §2.A revision); today's first-Thu-run status doesn't override the daily check.
cardio.workout: 30 min continuous Z1, treadmill 1% or flat outdoor

targets.hr: Nasal-clean throughout (numbers reference only — Adj #9; off-191 ≤155 cap is artifact)

cardio.warmup: Built-in — first 3–5 min ease into Z1 from walk
cardio.cooldown: 3–5 min easy walk; Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 (SI prehab; McGill optional, not a quality day)
cues: Nasal breathing is the gate — if it breaks, you're not Z1, slow
Hold pace ≥9:45/mi; the recent 9:21–9:35 drift is the failure mode to avoid
Cadence natural 165–172 at easy; quality-day 178–182 doesn't apply
Report AM / during / post SI status post-session

currentLoads.note: 145×5 RIR 0 by mistake, then 140×5/5 RIR 2/1; 140 done at prescribed reps (last set RIR 1, above RPE 7). +5 → 145 next Wed (§5), expect RPE 8-9 — near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8
